response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video and identified the song title 'Soar' from on-screen text. 2. Transcribed the Japanese lyrics directly from the on-screen subtitles. 3. Translated the lyrics into English for the 'reference_lyrics_en' field. 4. Split the video into three scenes based on content: performance, talk, and closing message.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a virtual idol live performance of the song 'Soar', followed by a short talk segment and a closing message.

scenes.description: A virtual idol performs the song 'Soar' on a high-tech stage with lighting effects and digital screens. The performance includes singing and dancing.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
もっと輝くよ そうだろう
叫べばいい
憧れより眩しい歌 そして激しい歌
いつか耳を塞いだ
その両手がきっと翼になる
そう思うんだ
ゆれない衝動
高く飛べるよ そうだろう
抑えられない
羽ばたく理由を誰かに許されなくても
もう決めたよ 迷わない
向かい風もきっと進んでる証拠だって
君に伝えるんだ
何度でも君を呼んで また歩いてゆく
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Shine brighter, right? 
Scream it out, 
More dazzling than longing, the song, then the intense song, 
I blocked my ears once, 
Those two hands will surely become wings, 
That's what I think, 
Unyielding impulse, 
Fly high, right? 
Cannot hold back, 
Even if no one allows the reason to spread wings, 
I've decided, I won't get lost, 
The headwind is also proof that I'm advancing, 
I'll tell you, 
No matter how many times I call you, I'll walk again.

scenes.description: The performer talks to the audience, thanking them for attending the live performance.
A still image appears with text thanking the fans for their support, mentioning a solo live performance, and the date 2026.06.11.
